message:
fix(obligation): convergent CRDT repair tombstones prevent stale-replica resurrection

CrdtObligationEntry gains a repair_nodes set that tracks which nodes
have issued an abort repair for the entry. When a repair is applied,
the entry is projected onto a deterministic single-abort tombstone via
normalize_repair_tombstone (state=Aborted, single witness, single
acquire/resolve count, all attributed to the repair owner).

This marker is convergent: when a stale replica that still holds the
pre-repair conflicting state merges with the repaired version, the
repair_nodes set union causes normalize_repair_tombstone to re-project
the merged result, preventing the stale conflict from resurrecting.
Previously, a merge after repair could re-introduce the conflicting
witness/counter state that the repair was intended to resolve.

is_compact_tombstone_for now checks repair_nodes: entries with repair
markers use the repair-specific tombstone shape check instead of the
local-node check.

compact_for now applies normalize_repair_tombstone for repaired entries
instead of projecting onto the local node's identity.

obligation/recovery.rs: additional recovery helpers.
record/symbolic_obligation.rs: symbolic obligation model adjustments.
runtime/obligation_table.rs: obligation table updates for repair flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
